_notes: Small thesis-grade gold set for the multi-criteria job matcher.
Each case pairs one CV with N candidate jobs. Each job has an integer relevance label:
2 = fit         — explicit match on role + skills + seniority + location
1 = partial fit — adjacent role, transferable skills, OR location/seniority mismatch only
0 = no fit      — different domain, OR major skill gap, OR very wrong seniority
Labels reflect a single annotator's judgment (the author). For thesis defense,
expand this with 2-3 HR practitioners labeling independently and report inter-
annotator agreement (Cohen's kappa) before computing the metrics below.

cases.cv_text:
Budi Santoso
Domisili: Jakarta, Indonesia

EXPERIENCE
Backend Engineer at Tokopedia (Jan 2021 - Present)
- Built backend services with Node.js and PostgreSQL
- Designed REST APIs and microservices architecture
- Implemented Docker-based CI/CD with GitHub Actions
- Used Redis for caching

SKILLS
Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, REST API, Microservices, Git, GitHub Actions, SQL

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Backend Engineer with 3-5 years experience in Node.js and PostgreSQL. Must know REST API, Docker, microservices, Redis. Based in Jakarta.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Senior Backend Engineer with 6+ years of experience designing scalable services in Node.js, Postgres, Redis. Lead microservices initiatives.

jobs.title: Junior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Junior frontend role: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React. 1+ years experience. UI design sense required.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Remote)
jobs.description: Remote backend role. 3+ years Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST API. We're a distributed team.

jobs.title: Marketing Specialist
jobs.description: Marketing role: SEO, content writing, social media. 2+ years experience. No coding required.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: DevOps role focusing on Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, CI/CD pipelines. 3+ years infrastructure experience. Familiarity with Docker and GitHub Actions a plus.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Data analyst position: SQL, Tableau, Excel, A/B testing. Requires 2+ years experience working with business data.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Backend engineer 3-5 years. Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, microservices. Onsite role.
